name: Basil Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 package firm low-fat tofu, well-drained and sliced
1 teaspoon crushed chili pepper sauce (sambal oelek)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green onions and garlic in water, stock, or vinegar until tender.
2. Add the marinated tofu and cook another 5-10 minutes.
3. Stir in the fresh basil, chili pepper sauce, and soy sauce, then heat through.
4. Serve over cooked brown rice.
